task: Build a todo app with add, complete, and delete functionality. Include light/dark mode toggle. Use vanilla HTML/CSS/JS in a single directory.

accessibility.agentComment: Has aria-labels on controls, semantic HTML with main/header, dynamic aria-labels on checkboxes. Missing aria-live on dynamic regions, no skip-nav, no contrast verification.

performance.agentComment: Zero dependencies, small files, CSS transitions. Sub-second LCP as static files. No edge caching.

architecture.agentComment: Clean 3-file separation, CSS custom properties as tokens, class-based architecture with clear methods. Per-item event listeners instead of event delegation. No atomic design or documented APIs.
